---
title: "Assignment 2"
author: "Fabian Blasch, Nik Gabrovsek, Patrick Gyasi, Gregor Steiner"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), format = '%d.%m.%Y')`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,
                      #message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 5,
                      fig.height = 3,
                      fig.align = "center")
```

# VAR Coding Exercise
